ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ ١
ayahs.translation: About what are they asking one another?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٢
ayahs.translation: About the great news -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ ٣
ayahs.translation: That over which they are in disagreement.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ ٤
ayahs.translation: No! They are going to know.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ ٥
ayahs.translation: Then, no! They are going to know.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَـٰدًا ٦
ayahs.translation: Have We not made the earth a resting place?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَوْتَادًا ٧
ayahs.translation: And the mountains as stakes?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَخَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ أَزْوَٲجًا ٨
ayahs.translation: And We created you in pairs.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا ٩
ayahs.translation: And made your sleep [a means for] rest

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا ١٠
ayahs.translation: And made the night as clothing.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا ١١
ayahs.translation: And made the day for livelihood.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا ١٢
ayahs.translation: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا ١٣
ayahs.translation: And made [therein] a burning lamp

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٲتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا ١٤
ayahs.translation: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا ١٥
ayahs.translation: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا ١٦
ayahs.translation: And gardens of entwined growth.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ كَانَ مِيقَـٰتًا ١٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يَّوۡمَ يُنۡفَخُ فِى الصُّوۡرِ فَتَاۡتُوۡنَ اَفۡوَاجًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
ayahs.transliteration: Yauma yun-fakhu fis soori fataa-toona afwaaja

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٲبًا ١٩
ayahs.translation: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا ٢٠
ayahs.translation: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا ٢١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔـابًا ٢٢
ayahs.translation: For the transgressors, a place of return,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا ٢٣
ayahs.translation: In which they will remain for ages [unending].

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا يَذُوۡقُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا بَرۡدًا وَّلَا شَرَابًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink.
ayahs.transliteration: Laa ya-thooqoona feeha bar-daw walaa sharaaba

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا ٢٥
ayahs.translation: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: جَزَآءً وِفَاقًا ٢٦
ayahs.translation: An appropriate recompense.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُواْ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا ٢٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they were not expecting an account

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔـايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا ٢٨
ayahs.translation: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا ٢٩
ayahs.translation: But all things We have enumerated in writing.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَذُوقُواْ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمْ إِلَّا عَذَابًا ٣٠
ayahs.translation: "So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا ٣١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعْنَـٰبًا ٣٢
ayahs.translation: Gardens and grapevines.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتْرَابًا ٣٣
ayahs.translation: And full-breasted [companions] of equal age.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَأْسًا دِهَاقًا ٣٤
ayahs.translation: And a full cup.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٲبًا ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَـغۡوًا وَّلَا كِذّٰبًا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yasma'oona fiha lagh-waw walaa kiththaba

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا ٣٦
ayahs.translation: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,

ayahs.textUthmani: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ‌ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: رَّبِّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا الرَّحۡمٰنِ​ لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابًا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbis samaa-waati wal-ardi Wa-maa baina-humar rahmaani laa yam-likoona minhu khitaaba

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا‌ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ يَقُوۡمُ الرُّوۡحُ وَالۡمَلٰٓٮِٕكَةُ صَفًّا ؕۙ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُوۡنَ اِلَّا مَنۡ اَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا​‏
ayahs.translation: The Day that the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
ayahs.transliteration: Yauma yaqoo-mur roohu wal-malaa-ikatu saf-fal laa yatakallamoona ill-laa man athina lahur rahmaanu Wa-qaala sawaaba

ayahs.textUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذَٲلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ‌ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔـابًا ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: ذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمُ الۡحَـقُّ​ ۚ فَمَنۡ شَآءَ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰى رَبِّهٖ مَاٰبًا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: That is the True [i.e., certain] Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
ayahs.transliteration: Thaalikal yaumul haqqu faman shaa-at ta-khaatha ill-laa rabbihi ma-aaba

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٲبَۢا ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّاۤ اَنۡذَرۡنٰـكُمۡ عَذَابًا قَرِيۡبًا ۖۚ  يَّوۡمَ يَنۡظُرُ الۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدٰهُ وَيَقُوۡلُ الۡـكٰفِرُ يٰلَيۡتَنِىۡ كُنۡتُ تُرٰبًا‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have warned you of an impending punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust!"
ayahs.transliteration: In-naa anthar-naakum athaaban qareebaiy yauma yan-zurul marr-u maa qaddamat yadaahu Wa-ya-qoolul kaafiru yaa-lai-tanee kuntu turaaba
